member.name: ExStorStartWin
member.summary: Interaction logic for ExStorStartWin.xaml
ExStorStartWin

member.name: ExStorStartWin. InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: MainWindow
member.summary: Interaction logic for MainWindow.xaml
MainWindow

member.name: MainWindow. InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: MainWinModel. ReadAllFromTemp
member.summary: read the current information and save into ExStorData this can only be run after launch manager or if the information has been placed into the temp values in workbook

member.name: MainWinModel. WbkWithFalseModelName
member.summary: create a workbook with an incorrect model name - this will mimic a model having been created and then renamed or having been "saveas"d must be done on a "clean" model and then saved

member.name: MainWinModelUi. OnPropChgdEvent(System.Object,ExStorSys.PropChgEvtArgs)
member.summary: handle property changes from remote sources

member.name: MainWinModelUi. OnRestartReqdChanged(System.Object,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Flag noting that no other Ex Storage operations can occur until the system is restarted.Also, this can only happen when there is a single model open

member.name: ExListItem`1
member.summary: Ex Storage Element List Item of type (T) (schema or datastorage) each item can have attributes: version: T == correct version (default) | F == wrong version isvalid: T == is valid (default) | F == is invalid actoff:T == activation is off | F activation is not off (default) modelname: T == model name is correct (default) | F == model name is wrong

member.name: ExListItem`1. Version
member.summary: applied to sht ds and wbk ds true, item has the correct version (default) false, item has the wrong version

member.name: ExListItem`1. IsValid
member.summary: sht only true if valid (default) false if not valid

member.name: ExListItem`1. ActOff
member.summary: wbk ds only true if activation is off (bad) false if activation is not off (good) (default)

member.name: ExListItem`1. ModelTitle
member.summary: wbk ds only true if model name is good (default) false if model name is not good

member.name: ExStorData. RestartRequired
member.summary: flag that a restart of revit is required

member.name: ExStorData. ResetWorkBook
member.summary: reset the workbook to an empty workbook

member.name: ExStorData. ResetSheet(System.String)
member.summary: reset a sheet (set to empty) but only if creationstation >= 5

member.name: ExStorData. ResetWorkBookSchemaSilent
member.summary: Reset the workboon schema to null

member.name: ExStorData. ResetSheetSchemaSilent
member.summary: Reset the workboon schema to null

member.name: ExStorData. ResetSheets
member.summary: initialize sheets to an empty list

member.name: ExStorData. ResetTemp
member.summary: reset all temp objects to null or empty

member.name: ExStorData. WorkBookSchema
member.summary: the workbook schema object can only be set to a schema once but can be set to null - which triggers the ResetRequired event

member.name: ExStorData. WorkBook
member.summary: the workbook object cannot be set to null

member.name: ExStorData. GetEmptyWorkBook
member.summary: get an empty workbook

member.name: ExStorData. SheetSchema
member.summary: the sheet schema object can only be set to a schema once but can be set to null - which triggers the ResetRequired event and, if set to null, can then be set

member.name: ExStorData. GetSheet(System.String)
member.summary: find and return a sheet by its name return invalid sheet if not found

member.name: ExStorData. TryGetSheet(System.String,ExStorSys.Sheet@)
member.summary: find a sheet by name and return as an out parameter return true if found, else false

member.name: ExStorData. GotSheet(System.String)
member.summary: determine if a sheet exists by its name

member.name: ExStorData. GotShtDs(System.String)
member.summary: does the named sheet have a DS

member.name: ExStorData. GetSheetFieldData(System.String,ExStorSys.SheetFieldKeys)
member.summary: Retrieves the data for a specified field from a sheet with the given name.

member.name: ExStorData. SheetsList
member.summary: return the sheets list

member.name: ExStorData. AddSheetPreInit(ExStorSys.Sheet)
member.summary: add a sheet to the sheets list but only if creationstation > 0

member.name: ExStorData. UpdateSheet(ExStorSys.Sheet)
member.summary: update a sheet (replace) with a sheet but only if the replacement sheet creationstation > 0

member.name: ExStorData. RemoveSheet(ExStorSys.Sheet)
member.summary: remove a sheet from the sheets list but only if creationstation less than 5

member.name: ExStorData. SheetsCount
member.summary: return the number of sheets in the list

member.name: ExStorData. GotWbkSchema
member.summary: got a valid workbook schema

member.name: ExStorData. GotShtSchema
member.summary: got a valid sheet schema

member.name: ExStorData. GotWorkBook
member.summary: got a defined workbook?

member.name: ExStorData. IsWorkBookEmpty
member.summary: determine if the workbook is empty

member.name: ExStorData. GotWbkDs
member.summary: does the workbook object have a DS

member.name: ExStorData. IsSheetEmpty(System.String)
member.summary: true if the named sheet is flagged as empty

member.name: ExStorData. GotAnySheets
member.summary: does the sheets list have any sheets

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempWbkSchema
member.summary: temp workbook schema is not null and is valid

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempWbkDs
member.summary: temp workbook DS is not null and is valid

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempWbkEntity
member.summary: temp entity is not null and is valid

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempWbkDsList
member.summary: list of not null and has > 0 elements

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempShtSchema
member.summary: temp sheet schema is not null and is valid

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempShtDs
member.summary: temp sheet DS is not null and is valid

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempShtEntity
member.summary: temp entity is not null and is valid

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempAnySheets
member.summary: list is not null and has > 0 elements

member.name: ExStorData. GotTempAnySheetsEx
member.summary: Exlist is not null and has > 0 elements

member.name: Sheet
member.summary: the secondary data object(s) stored in the data storage object

member.name: Sheet. DsSearchName
member.summary: the root name for searching for the actual DS - does not include model code or thereafter.

member.name: Sheet. Invalid
member.summary: create an "invalid" sheet - used as a return value rather than null

member.name: Sheet. PlaceHolder
member.summary: create an "invalid" sheet - used as a return value rather than null

member.name: Sheet. CreateEmptySheet(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage)
member.summary: create a named empty sheet.ds is saved to the created sheet

member.name: Sheet. CreateEmptySheet(System.String)
member.summary: create a named empty sheet

member.name: Sheet. CreateSheet(System.String,ExStorSys.SheetCreationData)
member.summary: create a complete sheet populated with sheetCreationData

member.name: SheetCreationData
member.summary: used to hold data needed to create or copy a sheet for copy, only those fields NOT marked as FC_NEVER need a possible value and, depending on copy type, not all of the other copy types will need a value

member.name: WorkBook
member.summary: the primary data object stored in the data storage object

member.name: WorkBook. DsSearchName
member.summary: the root name for searching for the actual DS - does not include model code or thereafter.

member.name: WorkBook. DsName
member.summary: the name for the data storage object.assigned when the workbook is created

member.name: WorkBook. Desc
member.summary: shortcut for access to the description of the workbook

member.name: WorkBook. SchemaName
member.summary: the name for the workbook schema. fixed value.assigned when the workbook is created

member.name: WorkBook. SchemaDesc
member.summary: the description for the workbook schema

member.name: WorkBook. SchemaGuid
member.summary: the guid for the workbook's schema.assigned when the workbook is created

member.name: WorkBook. Invalid
member.summary: create an "invalid" workbook

member.name: WorkBook. CreateEmptyWorkBook
member.summary: create a workbook with initial / basic data

member.name: WorkBook. CreateNewWorkBook
member.summary: create a workbook with typical data and with a model code

member.name: Exid. ModelTitle
member.summary: Actual model name (title) (un-cleaned)

member.name: Exid. ModelName
member.summary: Cleaned actual model name (title)

member.name: Exid. WbkSearchName
member.summary: includes app code + wkb name code - does not include model code

member.name: Exid. ShtSearchName
member.summary: includes app code + sheet name code - does not include model code

member.name: Exid. WbkSchemaName
member.summary: Full name of the workbook schema

member.name: Exid. ShtSchemaName
member.summary: Full name of the sheet schema

member.name: Exid. CreateWbkDsName
member.summary: CsCells_WBK_v1_00 / example: CsCells_WBK_v1_00 id code removed

member.name: Exid. CreateShtDsName(System.String)
member.summary: CsCells_Sht_{ID}_v1_00 / example: CsCells_Sht_ABCD_v1_00 model code removed, uses current version

member.name: Exid. CreateFirstShtDsName
member.summary: CsCells_Sht_250101_16010_AAAA_v1_00 model code / id code reversed

member.name: ExStorLaunchMgr. OnOpenDocLaunchVfy
member.summary: initial verification.verifys that schema's and data objects exist true if both schema and ds are found and good false if any issues a code is returned that identifies the status of each of the four validations the code -1 is returned when a validation is not performed because a prior failed and testing cannot continue

member.name: ExStorLaunchMgr. findWbkDataStorage2
member.summary: initial verification step.find a wbk ds and save this to xData

member.name: ExStorLaunchMgr. verifyWbkDataStorage2
member.summary: verify wbk ds part 2.verify activation status / setting and verify the model name

member.name: ExStorLaunchMgr. findShtDataStorage2
member.summary: initial verification step.find sht ds's and save this to xData

member.name: ExStorLaunchMgr. verifyDataStorage(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage,System.String,ExStorSys.ExListItem{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage}@,System.String@)
member.summary: initial validation of a datastorage element

member.name: ExStorLaunchMgr. verifySchema(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema,System.String,ExStorSys.ExListItem{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema}@)
member.summary: verify if the schema is OK validates if an OK revit object and the version is correct

member.name: ExStorLaunchMgr. verifySchemaGuid(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Guid})
member.summary: validate the schema's guid against a list of guids.the list of guids should come from the data storage object

member.name: ExStorLib. WriteWorkBook(ExStorSys.WorkBook,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema)
member.summary: takes the information stored in the workbook in xData and writes the information into the workbook's entity (and therefore into the models ds).this creates a new DS so an existing DS must not be present. use UpdateWorkBook to update an existing DS

member.name: ExStorLib. createDs``1(ExStorSys.ExStorDataObj{``0})
member.summary: create a DataStorage object for the associated exo object.the DS object must not already exist - check first

member.name: ExStorLib. MakeSchema``1(ExStorSys.ExStorDataObj{``0})
member.summary: make, populate, and return a schema.return null if fail (if already exists)

member.name: ExStorLib. DeleteDs(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage)
member.summary: delete a datastorage object - when done it is gone

member.name: ExStorLib. EraseSc(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema)
member.summary: erase a schema and all its entities.when it is deleted, a schema stays in memory until the document is closed.it cannot be reused

member.name: ExStorLib. UpdateEntityField``1(``0,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema,ExStorSys.ExStorDataObj{``0},UtilityLibrary.DynaValue)
member.summary: update a field within the ds entity using a revit transaction

member.name: ExStorLib. updateEntityField``2(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema,ExStorSys.ExStorDataObj{``0},ExStorSys.FieldData{``1},UtilityLibrary.DynaValue)
member.summary: update a field within the ds entity using a revit transaction

member.name: ExStorLib. updateEntity(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Entity)
member.summary: update a field within the ds entity using a revit transaction

member.name: ExStorLib. ReadEntityFields``1(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Entity,ExStorSys.ExStorDataObj{``0})
member.summary: read all fields from the entity into the exo object

member.name: ExStorLib. FindAllSchemaByNamePrefix2(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema}@)
member.summary: find all schema's that starts with the search name

member.name: ExStorLib. FindAllSchemaByNamePrefix(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema}@)
member.summary: find all schema's that starts with the search name

member.name: ExStorLib. findDataStorages
member.summary: collect all datastore elements

member.name: ExStorLib. DuplicateSheet(System.Int32,ExStorSys.Sheet,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{ExStorSys.SheetFieldKeys,UtilityLibrary.DynaValue})
member.summary: duplicate a sheet based on the copy type (does not apply to workbook) copy types: int 0 through 7 compared to the copy type in the field however, defined types (all will need a new name): 1 - copy as a template for a new item (needs creation / modification info) 2 - copy to update the version (modification info) 4 - copy to use in a new model (needs creation / modification info)

member.name: FieldEditLevel
member.summary: controls who can access the field. that is, a user's security level us used and the user can access a field if the field's edit level matches their security level or is a larger number. also, NONE, -1, cannot access anything

member.name: ExStorConst. WbkSchemaName
member.summary: always: CsCells_Wbk_Schema_v1_00

member.name: ExStorConst. ShtSchemaName
member.summary: always: CsCells_Sht_Schema_v1_00

member.name: ExStorConst. EXS_WBK_DS_NAME_PREFIX
member.summary: base name for a Wbk Ds (e.g. CsCells_WKB)

member.name: ExStorConst. EXS_WBK_NAME_SEARCH
member.summary: name used to search for Wbk Ds (same as EXS_WBK_DS_NAME_PREFIX) (e.g. CsCells_WKB)

member.name: ExStorConst. EXS_SHT_NAME_SEARCH
member.summary: name used to search for Sht Ds (e.g. CsCells_SHT)

member.name: ExStorConst. EXS_SHT_DS_NAME_PREFIX_FIRST
member.summary: name used to search for the first Sht Ds (e.g. CsCells_SHT_AAAA)

member.name: ExStorMgr
member.summary: Storage Manager - controls the primary admin operations

member.name: ExStorMgr. ExSysStatus
member.summary: state of the system 0 == started / configured, no schema, no ds 1 == got wbk 2 == got 1+ sheet(s) 3 == all ready 4 == restart required

member.name: ExStorMgr. UpdateWbkEntityField(ExStorSys.WorkBookFieldKeys,UtilityLibrary.DynaValue)
member.summary: update a workbook field of the key provided with the value provided return true if OK | return false if schema or workbook are missing

member.name: ExStorMgr. UpdateShtEntityField(System.String,ExStorSys.SheetFieldKeys,UtilityLibrary.DynaValue)
member.summary: update a sheet field of the name provided of the key provided with the value provided return true if OK | return false if schema or workbook are missing

member.name: ExStorMgr. updateEntityField``1(``0,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema,ExStorSys.ExStorDataObj{``0},UtilityLibrary.DynaValue)
member.summary: update a field within the ds entity using a revit transaction

member.name: ExStorMgr. CreateWorkBookSchema
member.summary: create a schema for workbook - if needed return true when made or already exists else return false

member.name: ExStorMgr. MakeWorkBook
member.summary: create the workbook and store in xData configure workbook with typical data and model code

member.name: ExStorMgr. WriteWorkBook
member.summary: Writes the workbook data to the external storage using the defined schema.
member.remarks: This method attempts to write the workbook data to an external storage location.The operation requires that the workbook schema is defined prior to invocation.If the write operation fails, the workbook schema is reset to null.

member.name: ExStorMgr. CreateSheetSchema
member.summary: create a schema for sheet - if needed return true when made or already exists else return false

member.name: ExStorMgr. DeleteDsList(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage},System.Boolean)
member.summary: delete the DS in the list provided if "onlyOne" onlu delete the first DS

member.name: ExStorMgr. FindWorkBookDs(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage@,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Entity@,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema@)
member.summary: find a model's associated data storage object (if any) regardless of whether it already exists that is, search type == 0

member.name: ExStorMgr. FindSheetDs(System.String,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage@,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Entity@,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema@)
ExStorMgr. FindSheetsDs(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage}@)
member.summary: {\rtf1\ansi\pard this is {\b bold} text\par}

member.name: ExStorMgr. FindAllWbkSchema(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema}@)
member.summary: find all workbook schemas and return them as a list based on the search name but not using the version
member.remarks: true == one+ found | false == none found

member.name: ExStorMgr. FindAllWbkDs(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage}@)
member.summary: \b1find\b0 all workbook DS **true** == one+ found | false == none found

member.name: ExStorMgr. FindAllShtSchema(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema}@)
member.summary: find all sheet schemas and place into temp variable

member.name: ExStorMgr. FindAllShtDs(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage}@)
member.summary: find all sheet DS and return via "out" true == one+ found | false == none found

member.name: ExStorMgr. findAllSchemaByName(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema}@)
member.summary: find all schema that start with the search name provided true == one+ found | false == none found

member.name: ExStorMgr. findAllDsByName(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage}@)
member.summary: find all datastorage that start with the search name provided true == one+ found | false == none found

member.name: ExStorMgr. readSheet(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema,ExStorSys.Sheet@)
member.summary: read all of the field values into a sheet

member.name: ExStorMgr. ReadModelName(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema)
member.summary: Reads the model name from the workbook DS

member.name: ExStorMgr. ReadActivationStatus(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema)
member.summary: Reads the model name from the workbook DS

member.name: ExStorMgr. ResetData
member.summary: reset the schema, workbook, and sheets to empty / null condition in xData

member.name: ExStorMgr. ProcTransWbk
member.summary: combo routine to transfer the workbook schema and the workbook ds

member.name: ExStorMgr. ProcTransSht
member.summary: combo routine to transfer a sht schema and the sht ds list (if exists)

member.name: ExStorMgr. ProcCreateAndWriteWbk
member.summary: combo routine to create a wbk schema and a wbk ds

member.name: ExStorMgr. ProcCreateSht
member.summary: combo routine to create a sht schema and the sht ds list

member.name: ExStorMgr. ProcFixModelName2
member.summary: combo routine to transfer the wbk schema and ds, update the model name with the current model name, then write the updated informtion back into the model's ds / entity

member.name: ExStorMgr. ProcTransShtToNewVer(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema)
member.summary: duplicate one sheet to another sheet with the same ID but uses the current Sheet version

member.name: ExStorMgr. ProcFixActivationOff
member.summary: combo routine to transfer the wbk schema and ds, update the activate status to true, then write the updated informtion back into the model's ds / entity

member.name: ExStorMgr. procTransOrCreateWbkSchema
member.summary: procedure to transfer or create a wbk schema

member.name: ExStorMgr. VerifyModelName
member.summary: verify if the temp workbook DS has the correct model name

member.name: ExStorMgr. VerifyActivationIgnore
member.summary: verify if the current temp workbook DS has activation ignore set

member.name: ExStorMgr. VerifyActivationOff
member.summary: verify if the current temp workbook DS has activation off set

member.name: ExStorMgr. transShtV1ToShtV2(ExStorSys.Sheet,ExStorSys.Sheet@)
member.summary: transfer the data from an old sheet version to the new version real routine but bogus as new and old are the same class but the concept is worked out. new sheet needs to be pre-configured with basic info (name, model name, etc.)

member.name: ExStorMgr. MakeCpyShtDataForNewVer(UtilityLibrary.DynaValue,UtilityLibrary.DynaValue)
member.summary: create the dictionary with the updated values when a sheet is duplicated specific for a type 2 (new version) copy

member.name: ExStorMgr. MakeCpyShtData(UtilityLibrary.DynaValue,UtilityLibrary.DynaValue,UtilityLibrary.DynaValue,UtilityLibrary.DynaValue)
member.summary: create the dictionary with the updated values when a sheet is duplicated

member.name: ExStorMgr. TransTempWbkObjectsToXdata
member.summary: transfer the temp version of workbook objects (schema, ds, and entity) to their standard location in xData

member.name: ExStorMgr. transTempWkbSchemaToXdata
member.summary: transfer the temp version of workbook schema to its standard location in xdata / workbook true if got temp wbk schema and it was saved in xData false if no temp wbk schema

member.name: ExStorMgr. transTempWbkDsToXdata
member.summary: transfers the model's wbk to the xData object and save the ds entity inxData

member.name: ExStorMgr. TransTempShtObjectsToXdata
member.summary: transfer the temp version of sheet objects to their standard location in the sheet(s)

member.name: ExStorMgr. transTempShtSchemaToXdata
member.summary: transfer the temp version of sheet schema to its standard location in the sheet true if got temp sheet schema and it was saved in xData false if no temp sheet schema

member.name: ExStorMgr. TransTempExSheetsToXdata
member.summary: transfer all of the sheets in the temp sheet list to their standard location in xdata / sheets true if got sheets and transfered null if there are no sheets to transfer false if the transfer process did not work note: reset the sheets list before using this method

member.name: ExStorMgr. setupSheets
member.summary: prep for sheets - transfer the sheet schema and reset the sheets list. does not make any sheets.returns false only if unable to create a missing sheet schema

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. StartOpr
member.summary: primary startup routine

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. winOpen2ndPlus
member.summary: open the window when the 2nd or more time

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. switchBoardD
member.summary: main processing switchboard possible results see SbResult enum

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. proc_sn
member.summary: start up normal can return SB_ALL_GOOD SB_OTHER_FAIL

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. proc_nw
member.summary: create new can return SB_REPAIRED_NEED_SHTS SB_OTHER_FAIL

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. proc_cs
member.summary: fix sheet version can return SB_REPAIRED_NEED_SHTS SB_OTHER_FAIL

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. proc_d
member.summary: fix model name can return SB_REPAIRED_NEED_SHTS SB_FAIL_NEED_NEW

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. proc_b
member.summary: create workbook can return SB_REPAIRED_NEED_SHTS SB_FAIL_NEED_NEW

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. proc_o
member.summary: reactivate can return SB_ALL_GOOD SB_REPAIRED_NEED_SHTS SB_FAIL_NEED_NEW

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. gotData
member.summary: flag if the repair process worked - that is, xData has the expected data true if got both schema's and both DS's null if need sheet DS false otherwise

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. startNormal
member.summary: normal start procedure - no repair needed

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. startActivate
member.summary: normal first time procedure - create and activate the system

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. startFixShtVersion
member.summary: convert the found sheets from an old version to a new version got: old sheets in xData.TempShtDsListEx

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. startFixModelName
member.summary: repair the incorrect model name stored in a workbook DS

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. startSetActive
member.summary: adjust the workbook DS to re-activate the ex stor system (but only when turned off)

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. deleteExistWbkDs
member.summary: delete all existing workbook DS found in memory

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. deleteExistShtDs(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage})
member.summary: delete all sheet DS per the list provided

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. deleteExistWbkSchema
member.summary: delete any workbook schema, from the workbook and from temp revised, only from the workbook - keep temp

member.name: ExStorStartMgr. publishStatus
member.summary: set the verify status for each component set launch code to LC_NA

member.name: FieldDef`1
member.summary: the definition of a single schema field. the schema field defines the information actual information stored in a DataStorage object this also contains field management and usage information v2 - added clean / dirty flag | added Duplicate Flag

member.name: FieldDef`1. FieldStatus
member.summary: identifies the status of the field - clean or dirty or n/a

member.name: FieldDef`1. FieldCopyType
member.summary: determines if the field should be duplicated when making a copy of the data

member.name: Fields
member.summary: The definition of each schema field for both primary and row schemas

member.name: Fields. WorkBookFields
member.summary: definition of each primary Sheet schema field this is stored in the data storage object named "workbook"

member.name: Fields. SheetFields
member.summary: definition of each row schema field

member.name: T:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue
member.summary: store a value as one of these data types: string, int, double, enum, Guid

member.name: F:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.dynValue
member.summary: the raw value stored

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsInvalid
member.summary: identified that this dynaValue is not valid

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.LastValueReturnedIsValid
member.summary: flag weather that the last GetValue() did provide the actual value.doing this rather than throw an exception

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.TypeIs
member.summary: get the data type

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.GetValueAs``1
member.summary: get the value based on the type parameter
member.typeparam: Data type to provide possible: string, int, double, enum

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.AsString
member.summary: get the value as a string

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsString
member.summary: determine if the value is a string

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.AsInt
member.summary: get the value as n int

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsInt
member.summary: determine if the value is an int

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.AsDouble
member.summary: get the value as a double

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsDouble
member.summary: determine if the value is a double

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.AsBool
member.summary: get the value as a bool

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsBool
member.summary: is the current dyna value a bool?

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.AsEnum
member.summary: determine if the value is a bool

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsEnum
member.summary: is the current dyna value an enum?

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.AsGuid
member.summary: return the value as a Guid if it is a Guid

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsGuid
member.summary: is the current dyna value a Guid?

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.AsDictStringString
member.summary: get the current value as a Dictionary of string, string

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsDictStringString
member.summary: is the current dyna value a Dictionary of string, string?

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.AsListString
member.summary: get the current value as a List of string

member.name: P:UtilityLibrary. DynaValue.IsListString
member.summary: is the current dyna value a List of string?

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. CsExtensions.IsVoid(System.String)
member.summary: true if string is null or whitespace false otherwise

member.name: T:UtilityLibrary. CsStringUtil
member.summary: StringDivide - divide a string into sub-strings of maxLength size and a maximum of maxLines JustifyString - justify (L/R/C) within a provided column width EllipsisifyString- ellipsisify (L/R/C) within a provided column width

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. CsStringUtil.ChoseWord(System.String[],System.Int32)
member.summary: provide a word depending on count (max array length). return the word form depending on the count number. use to pluralize a word for example this is 1 based (1 = the first word form)
member.param: string array with the various word options
the index for the word form to return (max array length - 1)

member.name: T:UtilityLibrary. CsUtilities
member.summary:
Utilities - list of functions nl - system new line UserName- the user's login name MachineName - the name of the machine CompanyName - the name of the user's company (if any) AssemblyName - the name of the assembly AssemblyVersion - the version of the assembly AssemblyDirectory - the directory of the assembly CreateSubFolders - based a root path, create sub-folders based on an array SubFolder - based on a root path, create a sub-folder path ValidateStringChars - search the test string for "invalid" characters ValidateChar - determine if the char is in a list of invalid char's RandomString - create a random string of a defined length (do I need this?) Extn: IndexOf(T Array) - get the index of an element in a generic array
INVALID_FILE_NAME_CHARACTERS - array of char that are not allowed in a file name INVALID_FILE_NAME_STRING- string of characters that are not allowed in a file name

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. CsUtilitiesMedia.GetBitmapImage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Load an image from embeded resource[use GetBitmapImageResource instead]

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. CsUtilitiesMedia.GetBitmapImageResource(System.String)
member.summary: get a BitmapImage from an assembly's resource cache (not from the embeded resource cache)
member.param: The path to the image including a preceding slashe. g. /folder/imagename.png

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. CsWpfUtilities.FindElementByNameContentControl``1(System.Windows.FrameworkElement,System.String)
member.summary: search for a framework fe
member.param: Starting point fe to start the search
The string name of the fe to find

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary. CsWpfUtilities.FindElementByName``1(System.Windows.FrameworkElement,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Find a WPF element given its name However, this is limited to the available visual tree That is, if the element is not displayed (e.g. on a hidden tab), it cannot be found
member.typeparam: The Type of element being found (i. e. 'ListBox'
member.param: The starting element of the search - use 'this' for the current window
The string Name of the element to find (which means it must have a name)
A flag to show each element as it is found in the Debug window
